title: Repealed
doc_html:
§964.2. Repealed by Acts 2017, No. 158, §2.

            Acts 2001, No. 969, §1; Acts 2011, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 38, §1; Acts 2017, No. 158, §2.

*NOTE: Repeal effective upon action of Judicial Council. See Supreme Court of Louisiana Report of the Judicial Council to the Louisiana Sate Legislature, March 9, 2018.
